name: NO-CHURN RUM AND RAISIN ICE CREAM
intro: Rum and raisin was always my go-to ice cream flavour. It was the flavour everyone in my family could settle on in the supermarket – and it’s what I have missed so deeply since going vegan! No-churn ice creams are just so easy to put together, they are the perfect carefree dessert to make for a low-key dinner.
method: Heat the rum in a saucepan over a medium heat until it’s just hot – not boiling. Pour over the raisins in a small bowl and leave to soak overnight.

The next day, whisk the cream in a bowl to firm, soft peaks. Add the condensed milk and vanilla extract to the soaked raisins, then fold them into the cream. Pour the mixture into a metal loaf tin (pan) or ice cream tub and cover with a lid or cling film (plastic wrap). Freeze for 3–4 hours until set.
